name: Rugby Rush
author: Poki
description: Looking for the best Rugby game online? Then Poki has the perfect game for you! Rugby Rush is a sports game in which you carry the ball over the opponents' goal line to score. Be fast, agile and act quickly if you want to win. Make sure to notice bonuses and collect power-ups to advance further in your rugby career. Can you handle this rush? How to play: Move Left / Right - Arrow keys Jump - Space About the creator: Rugby Rush is created by Codethislab.
